allow: Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env python -c 'import netCDF4; print\(\\"netCDF4 OK:\\", netCDF4.__version__\); import numpy; print\(\\"numpy OK:\\", numpy.__version__\)'")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env python -c 'import netCDF4; print\(netCDF4.__version__\); import numpy; print\(numpy.__version__\)'")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env python -c 'import numpy; print\(numpy.__file__, numpy.__version__\)'")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env python -c 'import numpy; print\(numpy.__dtype_size__\)'")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env pip show numpy")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env pip uninstall numpy -y")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda install -n wrfh_gis_env -c conda-forge numpy netcdf4 --force-reinstall -y")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env python -c 'import numpy; print\(numpy.__version__\); print\(numpy.dtype.__basicsize__\)'")
Bash(powershell -Command "conda run -n wrfh_gis_env python -c 'import sys; print\(sys.version\)'")
